mapper.select: SELECT id, subject_id, prog_language, question, answer, explanation, difficulty, is_ai_generated, created_at, updated_at FROM programming_language_problems ORDER BY id
SELECT id, subject_id, prog_language, question, answer, explanation, difficulty, is_ai_generated, created_at, updated_at FROM programming_language_problems WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, subject_id, prog_language, question, answer, explanation, difficulty, is_ai_generated, created_at, updated_at FROM programming_language_problems WHERE subject_id = #{subjectId} ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO programming_language_problems (subject_id, prog_language, question, answer, explanation, difficulty, is_ai_generated, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{subjectId}, #{progLanguage}, #{question}, #{answer}, #{explanation}, #{difficulty}, #{isAiGenerated}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE programming_language_problems SET subject_id = #{subjectId}, prog_language = #{progLanguage}, question = #{question}, answer = #{answer}, explanation = #{explanation}, difficulty = #{difficulty}, is_ai_generated = #{isAiGenerated}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
